series_metadata.series_description: Series includes all Offer, Contract and Amendment documents related to Master Maintenance Agreements. These documents cover information technology support services for hardware and software. Paper records stored on-site or warehoused. Machine readable stored in contract management database. ORC 2305 applies to these records.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain nine years after termination of the contract, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain nine years after termination of the contract, then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
